name: Broccoli Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 slices American cheese, broken into pieces
4 slices Swiss cheese, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli according to the package directions; drain.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs and stir in all the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Grease an 8" x 8" baking dish.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set.
